## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction Steps

```swift

```

2. Run the code above
3. See the error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error message and stack trace.

## Environment

- SDK version: [e.g. 2.1.0]
- Swift/Xcode version: [e.g. Swift/Xcode 3.11]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or logs here.
